name: OpenNeko Official
description: First-party plugins for OpenNeko. Published by the maintainers under @open-neko/* on npm. Written, tested, and supported by the OpenNeko team.

plugins.name: @open-neko/plugin-parallel-search
plugins.title: Parallel.ai Search MCP
plugins.description: Web search + page fetch via Parallel.ai's Search MCP over Streamable HTTP. Anonymous tier supported; Bearer-token authenticated tier optional. Two actions: web_search and web_fetch.

plugins.name: @open-neko/plugin-slack
plugins.title: Slack actions
plugins.description: Post messages, send DMs, react with emoji, and look up users/channels in Slack. Four actions, each separately approvable by operator rules. Authenticated via Slack bot token (xoxb-) stored in the per-user secrets file.

requires_env.description: xoxb-... bot token from your Slack app. Needs scopes: chat:write, im:write, reactions:write, users:read, users:read.email, channels:read, groups:read (depending on which actions you'll allow).
